code-review-local.description: Code review using local Ollama (offline fallback)

debugger-local.description: Deep debugging using local Ollama (offline fallback)

code-review.description: Review code for bugs and security

save.template:
Save the current session to ChromaDB memory.

List recent sessions first if needed.

Then save this session with a properly structured session_end entry using the chroma-helper.py CLI from the Shokunin install directory.

Summarize the output for the user showing what was saved.
save.description: Save current session to ChromaDB memory with structured context

load.template:
Load context from a previous session.

List recent sessions using chroma-helper.py. Show the list to the user and ask which session to continue.
If user picks a session, load the full context.
load.description: List recent sessions and load context from a chosen one

status.template:
Run a full Shokunin ecosystem healthcheck.

Windows: Run memory-healthcheck.ps1 from ~/.shokunin/scripts/
Linux: Run memory-healthcheck.sh from ~/.shokunin/scripts/linux/

Also check ecosystem drift: run shokunin-update.ps1 status

Summarize results showing pass/fail counts and any warnings.
status.description: Run full Shokunin ecosystem healthcheck and drift detection
